# Contributing

Thanks for contributing to orbit.

## Before you open a change

- Review the repository documentation and policies.
- Run `cargo build` before submitting changes.
- Run `cargo test` before submitting changes.

## Security

Report suspected vulnerabilities to security@example.com instead of opening a public issue.
